name: REST Assured Request Specification
description: Structure of a REST Assured HTTP request specification used in the given() clause.

fields.name: baseUri
fields.description: Base URI for the API under test.

fields.name: basePath
fields.description: Base path appended to the base URI.

fields.name: port
fields.description: Port number for the API under test.

fields.name: headers
fields.description: HTTP request headers as key-value pairs.

fields.name: queryParameters
fields.description: Query parameters appended to the request URL.

fields.name: pathParameters
fields.description: Path parameter values for URI templates.

fields.name: body
fields.description: Request body payload (JSON object, array, or string).

fields.name: contentType
fields.description: Content-Type header value for the request body.

fields.name: accept
fields.description: Accept header value for desired response format.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Authentication type: basic, digest, oauth2, preemptive, certificate.

fields.name: username
fields.description: Username for basic or digest auth.

fields.name: password
fields.description: Password for basic or digest auth.

fields.name: cookies
fields.description: Cookies to send with the request.
